ab: i ljaqediqedi tua nia umaq a ku gakku, djemedje aken a djemavac a sema gakku, sa ’u djavac uta a tjumaq.
ch: 我的學校在我們家旁邊，我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。
en: My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

ab: inika tjaljiqacaqaca a nia gakku, inika tjuruvu a mareka vencik, namakakeljakeljang amen a masantalj.
ch: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
en: Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.

ab: namatevetevelj amen i vava’asan, maciyuciyur amen a seman mali, sa’a matjatjauci’eci’el amen uta.
ch: 所有小朋友會聚在操場，一起玩球、一起聊天。
en: All the children will gather in the playground, play ball and chat together.

ab: kisaseljang tjanuamen a nia sinsi a kivangavang uta, namaya tua tacemekeljan amen i gakku.
ch: 老師們也會和我們一起玩，學校是個大家庭。
en: The teachers also play with us, the school is one big family.

ab: ljemita tu qadav a semuasuap amen, maljiyan tua namaparimasudj aravac a nia kakituluan.
ch: 我們每天都要打掃，大家要把教室打掃乾淨。
en: We have to clean every day, and everyone has to clean the classroom.

ab: izua vaik a semisic tua qezung, izua vaik a semuap ta zaqetja.
ch: 有些人去擦窗戶，有些人去掃地。
en: Some people clean the windows, some sweep the floor.

ab: nia suapen anan a penalinguljan a nia gakku, mapangapangalj amen tua sengsengan, namapalimasudj a ljemita tu qadav a nia gakku.
ch: 我們還會打掃學校的各個角落，大家分工合作，學校每天都很乾淨。
en: We will also clean every corner of the school. Everyone works together, and the school is very clean every day.
